phrasings.text: ensure the answer cites a credible source before finalizing
phrasings.note: single-policy citation_verify intent captured by compound evidence gate router (_looks_like_evidence_gate_intent: 'before' gate cue + 'credible source' noun); tripwire for compound misroute

known_limitation_note: The single-policy citation_verify intent ('cite a credible source before finalizing') is captured by the compound evidence gate router because _looks_like_evidence_gate_intent fires on 'before' (gate cue) + 'credible source' (evidence noun). The correct target for this phrasing is a single Stop/*/audit policy with a citation_verify verifier step, NOT the compound evidence_gate archetype. Tripwire pinned to the current compound outcome. Un-quarantines when _looks_like_evidence_gate_intent is tightened to not steal single-verifier 'cite a source' intents lacking an explicit gated tool.
